name: Workspace
description: Index the active folder, detect project shape, scripts, tests, docs, TODOs, run history, and tool audit events.

tools.name: connector_status
tools.description: List local plugin and connector readiness.

tools.name: workspace_index
tools.description: Build a structured index of the active workspace.

tools.name: health_report
tools.description: Summarize project shape, git state, likely checks, TODOs, and local health gaps.

tools.name: todo_report
tools.description: List TODO/FIXME markers found in the workspace.

tools.name: plugin_diagnostics
tools.description: Report plugin health, pending tools, connector readiness, and permission policies.

tools.name: model_recommendation
tools.description: Recommend local models for this Mac without downloading or running them.

tools.name: plan_task
tools.description: Show the local tool plan for a task without executing tools.

tools.name: run_history
tools.description: List recent Locus runs for this workspace.

tools.name: tool_audit
tools.description: List recent local tool approvals and executions.
